name: Delta Farmers Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Locally grown produce, eggs, honey, jams, jellies, breads, baked goods, handcrafted pottery, leather goods, artisan/handcrafted works; adjoining bazaar sells antiques, collectibles, and art

notes: On-file website (deltacofarmersmarket.com/home) is live and is the market's official site (confirmed consistent content across /home and root URL). Market is held at Haven House Thrift Store lot, 2195 Southgate Lane, Delta, CO — this differs from the on-file address '1001 Colorado 92', so address was updated to the site-stated location. Site explicitly states vendors do not accept SNAP/EBT/WIC assistance payments. Phone number, Instagram, ADA accessibility, and certified organic status are not mentioned on the site, so omitted.
